summary: Top-level `docs` and `chat` commands with idiomatic verbs (search, get, pages, page, listing, send, react, reply, members, followers, messages, etc.) replacing the spec-derived `workspaces docs <verb>-public` and `workspaces chat get-channels` paths. Original verbs preserved as Cobra aliases for back-compat.
reason: The generator names commands after API operationIds. ClickUp's v3 docs and chat operations carry the `-public` suffix and live deeply nested under `workspaces`, which is rough on humans and on agent prompts. The aliases give a flatter, more memorable surface without losing the original paths.
